data.description:
He was powerful.
He was terrifying.
He was huge.
He had the whole world under his feet, the whole world within his grasp—but to him, she was his world, she meant everything.
He was feared by all, but it only mattered that she was scared of him.
He was worshipped by billions, yet he worshipped the very ground she walked on.
His calloused hands were capable of ripping people apart, yet they only held her with tenderness and possessiveness.
His claws ripped out throats, yet they only extended towards her to play with her curls.
"For there will be one born from chaos, forged from the ruins and the ashes of the ages. He will be the chosen one, the one to host the darkness. He will be engraved with the lines of the goddesses' touch and the fates will bow to him. But he will be the one to bring forth the carnage, that will end the world's that began under his feet. His light, her darkness. Every darkness needs a light but his will be lost in the times. Betrothed to the darkness, one with it. The cycle will go on till the darkness finds the light, to be one eclipse. For at the end, blood will flow."
data.title: The Possessive Alpha King And His Fated Queen

data.description:
Alessandro was supposed to be her protector.

Her brother’s closest friend.

The one man she trusted without question.
The night his father is murdered, trust dies with him.

Convinced the Moretti family is responsible, Alessandro returns to Naples burning for revenge. He doesn’t investigate. He doesn’t hesitate. He destroys. Elara becomes the price of his grief ripped from her life and forced into captivity by the very man who once promised to keep her safe.

Her marriage doesn’t save her.

Her pregnancy doesn’t stop him.

One by one, everything she loves is taken from her until survival becomes her only remaining instinct. Trapped in a world ruled by violence and control, Elara must endure a man who claims her as punishment… and slowly begins to want her as something more dangerous.

Then the truth surfaces.

The Morettis were never guilty.
Her father was never a murderer.

The war was built on a lie.

Now Alessandro must face the reality that the woman he shattered was innocent and Elara must decide what to do with the truth when forgiveness may be more impossible than hate.
data.lastChapterTitle: Chapter 164 The Rules She Set in Blood
data.title: My Mafia, My Tormentor

data.description:
Charlotte Pierce is used to surviving in motion. New towns, new schools, the same old house on the edge of nowhere, and the same rule that keeps her standing. Keep her twin brother, Charlie safe. Keep his hockey dream alive. Keep her own needs quiet. She works too much, sleeps too little, and saves the one thing that still feels like hers for the middle of the night, when she can lace up her worn skates and carve freedom into dangerous frozen ice. Charlotte and Charlie shifted once, years ago, and never understood what it meant. They had no pack, no guidance and no protection. Just two twins clinging to each other and pretending the voice in their heads was stress, imagination, or loneliness. Then they move to Wellington.
Blake Atlas scents his mate the moment Charlotte arrives. The bond hits hard and unmistakable, but Charlotte doesn’t recognise it. She doesn’t know why her chest keeps pulling toward the one boy she absolutely cannot afford to want. Blake is Charlie’s new hockey captain. Charlie’s chance at making something good. Charlie makes it clear; his sister is off-limits and Blake tries to do the right thing, but secrets don’t stay buried forever. Rogues prowl the edges of town. The ice cracks. The bond tightens. Then Charlotte’s rare white wolf awakens, the very thing that makes her powerful, also makes her a target. 
Shanti needs Shakti. (Peace needs strength.)

Where the Ice Gives Way is a slow-burn YA paranormal romance filled with fated mates, protective alpha energy, fierce sibling loyalty, found family pack bonds, hurt/comfort, and quiet, aching tension. It’s a story about first belonging, learning to be cared for, and what happens when the girl who has always held everyone else up finally falls, and someone catches her.
data.lastChapterTitle: Chapter 160 Ice Cream and Normal Problems
data.title: Where The Ice Gives Way

“Your pussy is dripping, begging for me to use it.” He whispered, his deep and sexy voice sending my whole body on fire. His fingers brushed over my clit, slowly down my entrance.

“Fuck, you are so damn tight.” He muttered, sliding two fingers in and began finger-fucking me.

“Please,” I breathed, needing more.

_____________________

After being kicked out of the house by her parents and rejected by the man who got her pregnant. Abigail was left on the street which led to the loss of her baby.

But what she never expected was being kidnapped by the same man who killed her father. The ruthless and mafia Don, who the rumours has it that he doesn't have a heart. He radiates danger but couldn't bring herself to hate him.

Will she survive his obsession or will she be destroyed by it?
data.lastChapterTitle: chapter 288: Take Whatever You Want From Me
data.title: Claimed By The Mafia Don

data.description: Naledi's grandmother is sick and she has to work her way out to earn money for her grandmother's wellness

data.title: Errands For The Devil

data.description:
Eileen Sharp was a straight-A student with a bright future until she met her ex-boyfriend and became pregnant. Now a single mother, Eileen needed a second job to make ends meet. 
[Urgently Need Breastmilk. Compensation Negotiable.]
Eileen laughed. This was either a joke or a forty-year-old man with a weird kink. She wanted to scroll away, but she had bags of breastmilk in the fridge, and money was tight. Did it matter what the old man did with it, anyway?
She risked getting kidnapped. The moment she saw him, she was dazzled. 
.
Billionaire Dominic Presley was engaged to Hollywood’s Sweetheart. He had all the money in the world, but it couldn’t buy his infant son formula he could keep down.
Dominic needed a miracle. 
It was a sweet angel with bags of breastmilk in her arms. The attraction was instant. 
Can Dominic ignore his growing attraction to Eileen to save his engagement? This woman would save his son, but she was the forbidden fruit he couldn’t refuse. This wouldn’t end well, he knew. 
Eileen knew her time with him was short. She was her boss. She hated herself for lusting after a taken man. But she hated herself more for wishing the crying little boy was her own. She loved him at first sight, more than his gorgeous father. And she wished she would never part.
Can she leave when the time comes? Or will she steal the family she dreams of?
data.title: Nanny For The Billionaire's Baby

data.description:
Elise’s
 Every time Damien speaks, I feel myself shrinking, waiting for the edge in his voice to turn cruel. But it never does. He is blunt, yes, but not in the way I have come to fear. He pushes, but not too hard, as if he knows I might break. That unsettles me more than his sharp grin or the way every girl on campus watches him walk by.
I keep telling myself he is dangerous, that his type will ruin me, but my body betrays me. My pulse stumbles when his hand brushes mine. My stomach twists when his attention lingers too long. And deep down, I am terrified of what will happen if I stop running from him. Because for the first time in years, part of me wonders what it would feel like to trust a man again.
*************

His hot breath makes me sigh. “And I would like your cock.”
“Already?”
“Yes.”
“Careful, Paulina…” Adrian warns. “You are so tight.” He slides one thick finger inside me, and I shut my eyes as he adds another. I clench around them, and he breathes a low laugh. “My cock is much, much bigger than this. Do you think you can handle it?”
My answer is a breathless gasp. “Yes…” The truth is, I might actually die if I do not feel him inside me. I am pulsating with need. “Fuck me, Adrian.”
A dark, low chuckle rumbles from his chest.
His fingers slide deeper, finding a perfect, sensitive spot. He works me there, his touch slow and expert. It is not long before my breaths are coming in short, ragged pants.
“Ungh…” I moan. “That feels so good…”
data.lastChapterTitle: Look at you... almost becoming my wife.
data.title: The Quarterback’s Broken Girl

data.description:
For six years, Cassandra poured her heart into raising her husband’s son, Rowan. Her world shatters when his first love, Nadia, returns and is revealed as Rowan's biological mother. 
Her Alpha husband blatantly sleeps with Nadia in their marital bed and ruthlessly severs his mate bond with Cassandra. 
Stripped of her Luna title, she is publicly humiliated as her husband declares, "My son doesn't need a murderer for a mother."

Even worse, the six-year-old boy she saved completely rejects her. Shouting, "You're not my mom," he ignores her heavy chains and desperate pleas, running to hug Nadia instead. 
Banished and disgraced, Cassandra barely survives a fatal car crash, only to discover she is carrying her traitorous ex-husband's child.

Five years later, she rises from the ashes as the elite physician, "Dr. Frost." When the once-arrogant Alpha is poisoned and dying, he begs for her help and forgiveness. But she simply turns and walks away.

How will Cassandra exact her ultimate revenge? And when their five-year-old daughter is struck by a severe illness, will this tragic twist force a turning point in their deadly entanglement?
data.title: Banished By The Alpha, Claimed By The Lycan King

data.description:
"You can do more than saying sorry." He raised my chin up, his eyes boring into mine.

"H..how?"

His lips lifted up into a cocky smirk. "By showing action."

My face squeezed into a small frown, then a scoff followed suit. "You mean by getting down on my knees?"

"Sounds better coming from you." He brushed his thumb on my lips, startling me a bit. My heart picked up its pace.

His eyes flickered between my eyes and lips, "sure I want you to get on your knees, Kinky, and use your pretty mouth...but not to apologize." He pushed his thumb forward, parting my lips open.

_

‎Deprived of parental love. ‎Subjected to being her sister's shadow. What Uriel didn't expect was to be a pawn in Ryder Connell's sick game.
‎
‎What started as a bully relationship because 'the golden boy' couldn't take rejection, pivoted into something dangerously emotional only to crash because it wasn't mutual.
‎
A bet. That was all it was to Ryder.
‎
‎Uriel is devastated but that's not all. Her sister was going to stop at nothing until Uriel burned to the ground. Uriel has reached rock bottom and is ready to fight back. But what if she was bound to fail from the beginning?
data.title: Once My Bully

data.description:
Alex

The entire world imploded in the blink of an eye. A virus so deadly that it decimated the entire population before there was a chance of creating a cure. 

Those that survived were changed irrevocably in many ways.

One of these was the development of The Alpha Gene.

Alpha's control everything, and the rest of us live by their whims.

Alphas are always looking for a bond, and females have no say. True mates are the ultimate prize for an Alpha.

When I met Xander Vandicoff he declared I was the true mate to him and his 2 brothers.

I said no, and ran to be free.

When they find me they will make me pay in ways I never could have imagined.
data.lastChapterTitle: Chapter 148 Legacies, And Living Our Forever
data.title: Death By Breathing

data.description:
⚠️ DARK ROMANCE WARNING ⚠️
This is a very dark romance with a toxic, possessive, unhinged male lead who gets worse as the story continues.
Expect: obsession, stalking, rape,  body shaming, drug trafficking, murder, kidnapping, dubious consent, non-consent, graphic violence, rough/degrading sex, manipulation, and other heavy triggers.

The book gets darker and darker. 

If any of these upset you, please do not read. This story is for adults who enjoy very dark themes only.

I WARNED!
****************

“You will always live in my dead wife’s shadow. I will never love you.”

Those were my husband’s first words to me on our wedding day. Not I love you. Not welcome home. Just a cold promise I would spend the rest of my life paying for a crime I didn’t commit.

And the worst part?

He was right.

I was deaf. Fat. Broken. Betrayed by everyone I had ever trusted. By the time Alexander Miller walked into my life, there wasn’t much of me left to destroy. 

I thought marrying him would give me stability, a fresh start.

I didn’t know it would trap me in a house filled with a dead woman’s memories.

Every time he touched me, I felt it. Even when he was buried deep inside me, he whispered her name like I was just a substitute for the wife he lost.

All because I had her face.

And he believed I had taken her life.

He made sure I paid for it every single day.

And when he finally learned the truth…
I was already dead.
data.title: The Billionaire’s Silent Wife

data.description:
She heard the one phone call she was never supposed to hear.
Zara Idris was not looking for trouble. She was just a dedicated NGO field coordinator trying to finish a late night report in the gleaming offices of the Al-Rashid Foundation in Abuja. Hardworking, focused, and careful. The kind of woman who followed the rules and expected others to do the same.
But rules mean nothing when you walk down the wrong corridor at the wrong time.
One overheard phone call. One cold and ruthless voice giving an order that made her blood run cold. And suddenly Zara knows something she was never meant to know about the man whose foundation signs her paycheck.
Khalid Al-Rashid is everything Abuja whispers about behind closed doors. Half Arab, half Nigerian. The son of an oil dynasty who doubled his inheritance through means nobody dares to question. Politicians return his calls on the first ring. Enemies simply disappear.
Ruthless with everyone.
Except her.
When Khalid finds Zara outside his office having heard too much, the smart move is to make her a problem he no longer has to worry about. But something stops him. The way she stands her ground and refuses to flinch even when every instinct should be telling her to run.
So instead he pulls her closer. Into his world. Into his danger.
Zara tells herself she is not afraid of him.
She should be.
Because the most dangerous thing about Khalid Al-Rashid is not his empire or his enemies. It is the way he looks at her like she is the only thing he has ever wanted to keep.
data.title: Deadly Favour

data.description:
Alexa Rayes has spent her entire life just trying to survive. Working odd jobs, sacrificing her dreams, and falling for a man that ultimately breaks her. 

After Alexa asks a stranger to kiss her and promises to give him anything he wants, she wakes up in his penthouse… stares at a marriage contract. 

Silas Dmitrev, the most feared Mafia Don in New York and ruthless Alpha has been looking for his mate for years and just found her.

And he expects her to marry him. 

Alexa is tossed into a world of riches, danger, and werewolves. 

Only there's one problem:

Silas was supposed to marry Adeline Grace, a supermodel, powerful she-wolf, and the woman who has been training for years to become Luna, but she refuses to stand aside.

She swears that she would do whatever it takes to get Silas, even kill her rival. In the wolf world, there is only one Luna and Adeline will burn the world down before she allows a mere human to have her destiny.

But will Alexa let her? Or will she run?
data.title: The Alpha I Married By Mistake

data.description:
On Valentine’s Day, love is in the air—but so is danger.
At 30,000 feet, trainee captain Jane Harley proves she’s more than just a rising pilot when she navigates a terrifying turbulence that leaves passengers shaken and lives hanging by a thread. Calm under pressurej and fiercely capable, Jane becomes the unexpected hero of Flight 423.
But while she’s saving lives in the sky, fate is already setting something far more complicated in motion.
Among the passengers is the powerful and ambitious mother of Jayden—Aurelia Air’s largest shareholder—whose midair health crisis is only the beginning of a chain of events. Grateful and intrigued, she sets her sights on Jane… not just as a hero, but as a future daughter-in-law.
Jayden, a grounded pilot with a sharp mind and guarded heart, has no interest in his mother’s schemes—until one unexpected name changes everything.
In a world of wealth, expectations, and high-altitude emotions, two lives are about to collide.
Love, ambition, and fate take flight in Falling at 30,000 Feet.
data.title: Falling at 30,000 feets

data.description:
MERCILESSLY YOURS is a steamy, emotionally charged contemporary romance set against the high-stakes worlds of New York's corporate elite and Chicago's media landscape. It follows Veronica Lucy Gray, 29, a plus-size PR powerhouse who built her firm from nothing, and Ben Richards, 32, a cold, self-made billionaire who controls every room he walks into - except, increasingly, the ones Veronica is in.

What begins as a professional arrangement - exclusive PR representation - spirals into a legally binding fake engagement when Ben's past comes for him in the form of a lawsuit and a scorned woman. Veronica accepts reluctantly, financially cornered after her accountant betrays her and vanishes with $70,000 of her firm's money. The contract is clear. The timeline is fixed. The feelings, however, are not.

MERCILESSLY YOURS is a story about two people who built walls so well they forgot what it felt like to be seen and what happens when the wrong person sees through them completely.
data.title: Mercilessly Yours

data.description:
“I, Alpha Kai Blackwood, reject you, Elias Thorne, as my mate.”

The words tore through the silent crowd like a blade. I stood there, the unwanted, wolf-less omega, watching the man I loved choose a perfect, blonde she-wolf over me. Just the night before, he had pinned me against the wall, his voice rough with desire, whispering that he would keep me. He lied.

Humiliation burned my skin as I ran into the snowy woods, vowing never to return. I thought the pain of the broken bond would kill me. But a month later, living among humans, a healer’s words shattered my world: “You are pregnant, Elias.”

Impossible. Male omegas don’t carry pups. Unless... unless the legends of the White Wolf were true.

I returned to Silverfang not for him, but for answers. But the moment I stepped through the door, my scent hit him. Kai stormed into the room, his amber eyes blazing with a mix of fury and something darker. He cornered me, his hand hovering over my flat stomach.

“Why did you come back?” he growled, trapping me.
I looked him dead in the eye. “Because I’m pregnant, Kai. And it’s yours.”

The room went dead silent. His father, the Alpha, stepped forward with a sneer. “Lies! A male cannot—”
“Touch him,” Kai snarled, his voice vibrating with lethal Alpha power, “and I will rip your throat out.”
data.title: THE OMEGA THE ALPHA COULD'NT CLAIM

data.description: When a mysterious job offer lands on Avery Wellesley's doorstep, she's desperate to escape her crippling debts and the suffocating loneliness of her life. But little does she know, this job will entangle her in a world of ancient secrets, forbidden love, and supernatural danger. Billionaire CEO Alexander Ravenswood, the enigmatic alpha of the Nocturne pack, has been searching for a cure to his bloodline's dark curse - and Avery holds the key. As they navigate treacherous werewolf politics and deadly sabotage, their fake engagement becomes a passionate entanglement that could cost them everything. But can they trust each other, or will the secrets they keep tear them apart? Dive into the world of Tenebrous, where love is a luxury, and survival is a fight to the death. With the city teetering on the brink of chaos, can they trust each other enough to save Tenebrous - and themselves?
data.title: Avery and the Cursed Alpha

data.description:
The flowers beneath her mother's window died overnight. The meat in the palace kitchens rotted by morning. At first, Princess Mia thought it was a coincidence.
It wasn't.
A curse has been placed on her — one that kills everything she touches. And somewhere beyond the world's edge, a Rift has torn open the ocean floor, pouring monsters into the land her people call home. The prophecy says she is the one who will close it. The prophecy says it’s her destiny.
But a creature older than written history sang her a different version — and the words don't quite match.
Forced out of the palace and hunted by dark forces she doesn't yet understand, Mia sets out alone to find the truth behind the curse, the Rift, and the name she has carried her whole life.
Some prophecies are warnings.
Some are traps.
And some were written by the very hands that broke the world.
data.title: The Unwritten Princess

data.description:
Elena was a cold-hearted Reaper, a soul-collector who followed the rules. But when she saves Liam, an ordinary boy who wasn’t meant to survive, she breaks everything. 

Stripped of her powers, Elena is forced into a human life, tied to a secret love she’s forbidden to have.

Liam’s life is a mystery. His survival was a glitch in fate, and now, his very existence threatens the balance of life and death.

 As he and Elena grow closer, sparks fly and so do the dangers. With a jealous rival and a deadly supernatural enforcer on their trail, every moment could be their last.

In a world where love was never meant to exist between them, they’ll risk everything to stay together, but is love worth defying fate?


A sizzling forbidden romance where love is the ultimate rebellion.
data.title: Loving You Was Against the Rules

data.description:
A chaotic night blurred by champagne left me waking beside a stranger. I brushed it off as a careless, forgotten moment… until my new semester began.
The late freshman who walked into my psychology class? The same boy from that night. My best friend’s brother. My student.
What follows is a dangerous game of stolen glances, loaded questions, and fragile boundaries. He teases to pull me close; I cling to professionalism to push him away.
With my career, research grant, and reputation on the line, I must fight the forbidden attraction burning between us. But the more we resist, the harder we fall.
Can we survive a lie that started with a mistaken night… and a love that’s completely off-limits?
data.title: The Lines We Cross
